## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md and agree to the CLA
- [ ] My code compiles with both GCC and Clang (`-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic`)
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`ctest --output-on-failure`)
- [ ] I have not added any external dependencies
- [ ] My code does not introduce network calls without explicit user action
- [ ] I have measured performance impact (if applicable)
